---
name: Documentation issue
about: Fix a typo, broken link, unclear diagram, or missing topic
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Type

- [ ] Typo / grammar
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing topic
- [ ] Translation (which language?)
- [ ] Diagram needs updating

## Where

File path + section heading. E.g. `docs/02_方案文檔/Phase_0_啟動手冊.md` §2.3

## What's wrong

A clear and concise description.

## Proposed fix (optional)

If you have a suggestion.
